accounts.name: lp_dead_ata
docs: Dead address ATA — permanently locked MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY on first deposit.

accounts.name: lp_user_info
docs: Per-user continuous oSOLA reward state for this pool.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — needed to sign the oSOLA mint CPI.

accounts.name: o_sola_mint
docs: oSOLA mint — auto-harvested rewards are minted here.

accounts.name: user_o_sola
docs: User's oSOLA ATA — receives auto-harvested rewards.

accounts.name: user_token_in
docs: User's input token ATA (token_a if a_to_b, token_b otherwise).

accounts.name: user_token_out
docs: User's output token ATA — intentionally unconstrained on owner so integrators
can direct swap output to a different recipient account if desired.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Protocol market vault — receives the protocol fee portion (in input token).

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Receives the 2 % origination fee → distributed to hiSOLA stakers.

instructions.name: burn_o_sola_for_votes
docs: Burn oSOLA to gain additional voting power for the current epoch.
Unlike hiSOLA (which gives permanent voting rights + fees + borrow),
burning oSOLA grants **epoch-scoped** vote weight only — it resets
with every new epoch (new UserEpochVotes PDA).
The oSOLA bonus is NOT subject to the 30% per-address cap:
burning tokens is a permanent, deflationary act that justifies
uncapped influence for that epoch.
Conversion: 1 oSOLA (6 dec) = 1 vote unit (same as 1 hiSOLA).

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Read-only — used for pause check and o_sola_mint address.

accounts.name: o_sola_mint
docs: The oSOLA mint — needed for the burn CPI.

accounts.name: user_o_sola
docs: User's oSOLA token account — tokens are burned from here.

accounts.name: user_epoch_votes
docs: Epoch vote tracker — created on first burn if it doesn't exist yet.

instructions.name: checkpoint_lp
docs: Record a time-weighted LP balance snapshot for the caller in a given pool+epoch.
Must be called before the epoch ends; updates both the user and pool accumulators.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Read-only — used only for the pause check.

instructions.name: claim_bribe
docs: Claim pro-rata bribe after the voting epoch has ended.
claimable = total_bribed × user_votes / total_votes  (safe u128 muldiv)
Creating UserBribeClaim PDA is the idempotency guard (init = fails if exists).

accounts.name: user_reward_ata
docs: Destination — created if the user doesn't already hold this token.

accounts.name: user_bribe_claim
docs: Created by this instruction — its existence is the double-claim guard.

instructions.name: claim_contributor_hi_sola
docs: Contributor-only: claim vested hiSOLA (25 % TGE + 75 % linear over 6 months).
Mints SOLA to sola_vault (locked backing) + hiSOLA to contributor wallet 1:1.
Also snapshots the fee accumulator so the contributor earns fees from day one.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only — needed for accumulator snapshot before hiSOLA supply changes.

accounts.name: contributor_hi_sola
docs: Contributor's hiSOLA ATA — created on first claim if needed.

accounts.name: contributor_position
docs: Fee-share position — init on first claim; tracks fees_debt.

instructions.name: claim_contributor_vesting
docs: Contributor-only: claim vested oSOLA (25 % TGE + 75 % linear over 6 months).
Mints oSOLA to contributor wallet — floor-neutral until exercised.

accounts.name: contributor_o_sola
docs: Contributor's oSOLA ATA — created on first claim if needed.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: User's hiSOLA balance determines their fee share.

accounts.name: founder
docs: Only the hardcoded founder wallet may call this.

accounts.name: sola_vault
docs: Receives freshly locked SOLA backing the claimed hiSOLA.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only — needed for accumulator snapshot before hiSOLA supply changes.

accounts.name: founder_hi_sola
docs: Founder's hiSOLA ATA — created on first claim if needed.

accounts.name: founder_position
docs: Founder's fee-share position — tracks fees_debt for claim_fees.

accounts.name: founder
docs: Only the hardcoded founder wallet may call this.

accounts.name: founder_o_sola
docs: Founder's oSOLA ATA — created on first claim if needed.

instructions.name: claim_lp_emissions
docs: Mint a user's pro-rata oSOLA share from LP emissions for a given pool+epoch.
Requires: epoch finalized, user checkpointed during epoch, not yet claimed.

instructions.name: claim_lp_rewards
docs: Claim accumulated oSOLA LP rewards without changing liquidity.

accounts.name: user_lp
docs: User's LP balance — determines the reward share.

instructions.name: claim_partner_allocation
docs: Partner claims their one-time hiSOLA allocation.
hiSOLA is minted DIRECTLY into the partner's ve_lock_vault — the wallet
receives nothing.  This means:
- Voting power is available immediately via VeLockPosition (up to 4× at max lock).
- `borrow_usdc` is naturally blocked (wallet hiSOLA balance = 0).
- `total_hi_sola` is NOT incremented: locked hiSOLA is excluded from the fee
accumulator denominator, so existing stakers are not diluted during the lock.
- `UserPosition.fees_debt` is snapshotted at the current accumulator so the
partner earns staking fees only from their eventual `unlock_hi_sola` forward.
After lock expiry: call `unlock_hi_sola` → hiSOLA returns to wallet → standard
rules apply (fee share, borrow up to 75 % floor buffer, re-lock for more ve).

accounts.name: sola_vault
docs: Locked SOLA backing — 1 SOLA minted here per hiSOLA allocated.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only snapshot for the fee accumulator advance.

accounts.name: partner_allocation
docs: Partner's allocation PDA — verified by seeds + owner constraint.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Ve lock metadata — created on first claim.

accounts.name: ve_lock_vault
docs: Token vault holding locked hiSOLA.
hiSOLA is minted directly here — wallet balance stays 0, blocking borrow.

accounts.name: partner_position
docs: Fee-share position — fees_debt snapshotted at claim so the partner starts
earning fees only from `unlock_hi_sola` forward (not during the lock).

instructions.name: collect_to_pol
docs: Redirect a portion of market_vault fees to pol_usdc_vault. Authority-only.

instructions.name: configure_emissions
docs: Authority-only: reconfigure the epoch oSOLA emission decay curve.
Resets the decay clock to the current epoch — the new `initial` becomes
the emission for epoch 0 of the new schedule.  Use this to:
- Boost emissions at launch (high `initial`, soft `decay_bps`)
- Reduce emissions once pools are deep (lower `initial`)
- Adjust the floor to keep a minimum incentive long-term
`decay_bps` in [1, 10_000]:
10 000 = no decay (flat forever)
`floor_bps` in [0, 10_000]: minimum emission as % of `initial`.
1 000 = 10 % floor (recommended — never reaches zero).

instructions.name: contributor_borrow_usdc
docs: Contributor borrow: draw USDC from floor_vault against hiSOLA collateral.
Max cumulative borrow = 10 % of total *claimed* hiSOLA (dynamic, mirrors founder logic).
2% origination fee → market_vault. Flash-borrow guard included.

accounts.name: contributor_hi_sola
docs: Contributor's hiSOLA balance — collateral ceiling for the borrow.
Mirrors founder_borrow_usdc: borrow cannot exceed real on-chain hiSOLA held.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — needed to init contributor_usdc ATA on first borrow.

accounts.name: contributor_usdc
docs: Contributor's USDC ATA — created on first borrow if needed.

accounts.name: contributor_position
docs: Shared UserPosition PDA — same seed as regular users, enables repay_usdc.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Read-only — used only for the pause check.

instructions.name: deploy_pol
docs: Buy SOLA via bonding curve and/or add LP to the target pool. Authority-only.

accounts.name: pol_state
docs: PolState — not mutated here; used only as a PDA signer.

accounts.name: pol_lp_vault
docs: Created on first deploy_pol call; LP tokens are held here permanently.

instructions.name: deposit_bribe
docs: Permissionless: any protocol deposits bribe tokens to attract hiSOLA votes.
epoch must equal the current epoch — bribes target the live voting window.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Read-only — used only for the pause check.

accounts.name: bribe_vault
docs: Bribe metadata account. init_if_needed = multiple depositors additive.

accounts.name: bribe_token_vault
docs: Token account holding the deposited bribe tokens. Owned by bribe_vault PDA.

instructions.name: emit_pool_rewards
docs: Finalize the LP emission allocation for one pool after its epoch has ended.
Permissionless — anyone can call. Records how much oSOLA this pool's LPs may claim.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Read-only — used only for the pause check.

accounts.name: gauge_state
docs: Gauge for this pool — requires voters used the AMM pool address as pool_id.

instructions.name: flash_arbitrage
docs: Flash-arbitrage: burn oSOLA → mint SOLA → sell on AMM → split profit.
Caller pays zero USDC upfront. Profitable only when SOLA_AMM > 1 USDC (floor).
Profit split: CALLER_ARB_SHARE_BPS (10 %) to caller, rest to market_vault → hiSOLA stakers.

accounts.name: caller_o_sola
docs: Caller's oSOLA — burned atomically.

accounts.name: caller_sola
docs: Caller's SOLA — receives freshly minted SOLA then immediately sells it.

accounts.name: caller_usdc
docs: Caller's USDC — receives AMM proceeds; floor + protocol shares are deducted from here.

accounts.name: pool
docs: AMM pool — must pair SOLA with USDC.

accounts.name: floor_vault
docs: Floor vault — receives `amount_osola` USDC to back the freshly minted SOLA.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market vault — receives 90 % of gross profit → hiSOLA stakers via claim_fees.

instructions.name: founder_borrow_usdc
docs: Founder-only variant of borrow_usdc with a 10 % cap.
Max cumulative borrow = FOUNDER_BORROW_CAP_BPS (10 %) × total hiSOLA claimed.
With 7 M hiSOLA vesting linearly over 24 months (~291 k/mo), the founder
can borrow at most ~29 k USDC per month — enough for running costs while
the floor vault grows from organic user activity.

accounts.name: founder
docs: Only the hardcoded founder wallet may call this.

accounts.name: founder_hi_sola
docs: Founder's hiSOLA balance — used as collateral ceiling.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — needed to init founder_usdc ATA on first borrow.

accounts.name: founder_usdc
docs: Founder's USDC ATA — created on first borrow if needed.

accounts.name: founder_position
docs: Tracks founder's cumulative borrow (same seed as regular UserPosition).

accounts.name: founder_hi_vesting
docs: Vesting schedule — supplies the `claimed` amount used for the 10 % cap.

instructions.name: initialize_pol
docs: One-time setup: create PolState and its token vaults. Authority-only.

accounts.name: pol_usdc_vault
docs: USDC accumulator vault — receives collect_to_pol transfers.

accounts.name: pol_sola_ata
docs: Staging account for SOLA bought before LP deployment.

instructions.name: lock_hi_sola
docs: Lock hiSOLA for ve-weighted governance power.
Subsequent calls extend the lock or add tokens (never shorten).

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Caller's hiSOLA ATA — source of tokens to lock.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Lock metadata PDA. Created on first lock, updated on subsequent ones.

accounts.name: ve_lock_vault
docs: Token account holding locked hiSOLA. Owned by the lock_position PDA.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only market vault snapshot for accumulator advance.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: Fee-share position — updated at lock time so the user cannot claim fees
accumulated by other stakers during their lock period.
Created on first lock if not yet initialised.

instructions.name: migrate_user_position
docs: One-time account migration — expands an existing UserPosition from the
pre-`last_borrow_slot` layout (LEN=120, space=128) to the current layout
(LEN=128, space=136).  The 8 new bytes are zeroed so last_borrow_slot=0.
Permissionless per-user: the owner pays the extra rent and signs.

accounts.name: authority_sola
docs: Authority's SOLA ATA — receives the ecosystem allocation (1 750 000 SOLA).

accounts.name: founder_sola
docs: Founder's SOLA ATA — created here if it doesn't exist yet.

accounts.name: founder
docs: Founder wallet — hardcoded, cannot be substituted.

accounts.name: founder_hi_vesting
docs: hiSOLA progressive vesting schedule (7M, cliff + linear).

accounts.name: founder_vesting
docs: oSOLA progressive vesting schedule (5M, cliff + linear).

instructions.name: register_contributor
docs: Authority-only: register a contributor wallet with a dual hiSOLA + oSOLA allocation.
Mirrors the founder structure — hiSOLA (governance + borrow) + oSOLA (liquid options).
Vesting starts immediately (start_ts = now) — call at launch time.

instructions.name: register_partner
docs: Authority-only: register a protocol partner with a one-time locked hiSOLA allocation.
Unlike contributors (cliff + linear vesting), the partner claims the full amount
once via `claim_partner_allocation` — hiSOLA is minted directly to their
ve_lock_vault (never touches the wallet), giving immediate voting power while
borrow remains blocked for the entire lock duration.
`lock_duration_secs` must be in [MIN_LOCK_DURATION, MAX_LOCK_DURATION].
Suggested mainnet value: 52 × 604 800 = 31 449 600 s (≈ 12 months).

accounts.name: user_token_a
docs: User's token-A ATA (must already exist).

accounts.name: user_token_b
docs: User's token-B ATA (must already exist).

accounts.name: lp_user_info
docs: Per-user continuous oSOLA reward state for this pool.

accounts.name: protocol_state
docs: Protocol state — needed to sign the oSOLA mint CPI.

accounts.name: o_sola_mint
docs: oSOLA mint — auto-harvested rewards are minted here.

accounts.name: user_o_sola
docs: User's oSOLA ATA — receives auto-harvested rewards.

instructions.name: replay_vote
docs: Permissionless epoch vote carry-over for one pool entry.
Reproduces a single `vote_gauge` call using the owner's saved config.
The CALLER signs and pays rent; the OWNER's hiSOLA balance and ve-power
determine the actual vote weight — the owner need not be online.
Call once per pool entry per epoch (up to `config.n_pools` times).
Fails if `auto_replay = false` (`VoteConfigDisabled`).
Fails if `pool_id` not found in config (`PoolNotInConfig`).
Fails if `UserVoteReceipt` already exists — same double-vote guard as
`vote_gauge`; replay and manual vote for the same pool are mutually exclusive.
The 30% anti-whale cap applies identically to `vote_gauge`.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Keeper, partner bot, or the owner themselves — pays rent for new PDAs.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Owner's hiSOLA ATA — read-only, authority = user.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Pass SystemProgram when owner has no lock.

accounts.name: vote_config
docs: Owner's persistent vote config — must have auto_replay = true.

accounts.name: gauge_state
docs: Aggregate votes for this pool this epoch.

accounts.name: user_vote_receipt
docs: One receipt per (user, pool, epoch) — init fails on double-vote.
Mutually exclusive with a manual vote_gauge for the same pool/epoch.

accounts.name: user_epoch_votes
docs: Cumulative allocation tracker for the owner this epoch.

accounts.name: global_epoch_votes
docs: Global vote total — denominator for LP emission splits.

instructions.name: rollover_bribe
docs: Move remaining (unclaimed) bribe tokens from a past epoch into the current epoch vault.
Two cases:
• Zero-vote pool (gauge absent or total_votes == 0): rollover allowed immediately
after the epoch ends — nobody can ever claim, so recycling is safe.
• Pool with votes: a ROLLOVER_DELAY_EPOCHS grace period is enforced so that
slow voters are not robbed before they get a chance to claim.
Permissionless — anyone can call this for any (pool, token, old_epoch) triple.

accounts.name: old_bribe_vault
docs: Source: old epoch bribe metadata.

accounts.name: old_bribe_token_vault
docs: Source: old epoch token vault.

accounts.name: old_gauge_state
docs: PDA seeds [b"gauge", pool_id, old_epoch_le8] verified in instruction body.

accounts.name: new_bribe_vault
docs: Destination: current epoch bribe metadata (created if not yet seeded).

accounts.name: new_bribe_token_vault
docs: Destination: current epoch token vault (created if not yet seeded).

instructions.name: set_vote_config
docs: Save or update the caller's persistent gauge vote allocation.
Once `auto_replay = true`, any external caller (keeper, cron bot, partner)
can invoke `replay_vote` each epoch without the owner signing — enabling
fully passive bribe collection, identical to Beradrome/Velodrome behaviour.
Constraints:
- `n_pools` in [1, 5]
- `bps[0..n_pools]` must sum to exactly 10 000 (100 %)
- Unused slots: `pools[i] = Pubkey::default()`, `bps[i] = 0`

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Market vault — snapshots the accumulator AND is the source of any pending
fees auto-paid to an existing staker who adds more SOLA. Must be mutable.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — needed to init user_usdc ATA on first stake if absent.

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA — receives auto-harvested fees on stake. Created if absent.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current authority — must sign to approve the transfer.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: Validation is intentionally minimal: the new authority takes effect immediately.

instructions.name: unlock_hi_sola
docs: Return locked hiSOLA after expiry. Restores tokens to the fee pool.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Destination for unlocked hiSOLA. Created if user burned their ATA previously.

accounts.name: ve_lock_vault
docs: Source vault — tokens transferred back to user on unlock.

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Read-only market vault snapshot for accumulator advance.

accounts.name: user_position
docs: Fee-share position — updated at unlock time so the user starts earning
fees only from the moment of unlock (not backdated to before the lock).

accounts.name: market_vault
docs: Source of pending fee payouts. Mutable so fees can be transferred out.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — needed to init user_usdc ATA on first unstake if absent.

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA — receives any pending fees auto-paid on unstake.
Created if it doesn't exist yet.

accounts.name: founder_hi_vesting
docs: Founder vesting schedule — required when caller is FOUNDER_WALLET to
enforce the hiSOLA vesting lock on mainnet. Non-founder callers must
pass the SystemProgram pubkey; the check is skipped for them.

instructions.name: vote_gauge
docs: hiSOLA holder directs vote-weight at a pool gauge for the current epoch.
Total allocated across all pools ≤ raw hiSOLA + ve-weighted locked hiSOLA.
One UserVoteReceipt per (user, pool, epoch) — double-vote for same pool is blocked.

accounts.name: user_hi_sola
docs: Caller's hiSOLA balance determines base vote power.

accounts.name: lock_position
docs: Pass any account (e.g. SystemProgram) when not using a ve lock.
If valid and unexpired, adds ve-weighted power to the vote cap.

accounts.name: gauge_state
docs: Aggregate votes for this pool this epoch.

accounts.name: user_vote_receipt
docs: One receipt per (user, pool, epoch). init = fails on second vote for same pool.

accounts.name: user_epoch_votes
docs: Cumulative allocation tracker — prevents over-voting across pools.

accounts.name: global_epoch_votes
docs: Global vote total for the epoch — denominator for LP emission splits.

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage tolerance exceeded

errors.name: InsufficientFloorReserve
errors.msg: Insufficient floor reserve

errors.name: BorrowLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Borrow limit exceeded

errors.name: OutstandingDebt
errors.msg: Outstanding debt blocks this action

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the protocol authority

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: Nothing to claim

errors.name: AlreadyAllocated
errors.msg: Founder allocation already minted

errors.name: WrongEpoch
errors.msg: Epoch argument does not match current on-chain epoch

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Epoch has not ended yet — claim after the epoch rolls over

errors.name: VoteOverflow
errors.msg: Vote amount exceeds available hiSOLA balance for this epoch

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Insufficient liquidity in pool

errors.name: InvalidPoolTokens
errors.msg: Invalid pool tokens: same mint or unsorted mints

errors.name: ZeroLiquidity
errors.msg: Zero liquidity: deposit amounts must be non-zero

errors.name: LockNotExpired
errors.msg: Lock has not expired yet

errors.name: EpochNotFinalized
errors.msg: Pool epoch rewards not finalized — call emit_pool_rewards first

errors.name: NoVotes
errors.msg: No votes recorded for this pool/epoch — cannot distribute emissions

errors.name: NotProfitable
errors.msg: AMM price too low — arbitrage not profitable after floor replenishment

errors.name: InvalidArbPool
errors.msg: Pool must be a SOLA/USDC pair for flash arbitrage

errors.name: VestingCliffNotReached
errors.msg: Vesting cliff has not been reached yet

errors.name: VestingFullyClaimed
errors.msg: All vested tokens have already been claimed

errors.name: FounderBorrowCapExceeded
errors.msg: Founder borrow cap exceeded: max 10% of total claimed hiSOLA

errors.name: FlashBorrowDetected
errors.msg: Flash-borrow detected: repay cannot occur in the same slot as borrow

errors.name: ContributorBorrowCapExceeded
errors.msg: Contributor borrow cap exceeded: max 10% of total claimed oSOLA

errors.name: BorrowExceedsFloorBuffer
errors.msg: Borrow would bring floor vault below 75% of floor-backed supply — repay existing borrows or wait for more SOLA purchases

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused — only exit instructions (sell, unstake, repay, remove_liquidity, claim, unlock) are available

errors.name: VoteWeightCapExceeded
errors.msg: Vote would exceed the 30% per-address voting cap — no single address may control more than 30% of total hiSOLA voting power

errors.name: RolloverTooEarly
errors.msg: Rollover too early — epoch had votes, wait ROLLOVER_DELAY_EPOCHS before recycling remainder

errors.name: PartnerAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Partner allocation already claimed — each partner may only claim once

errors.name: PoolNotInConfig
errors.msg: Pool not found in user vote config — update config with set_vote_config

errors.name: VoteConfigDisabled
errors.msg: Vote config auto-replay is disabled — owner must call vote_gauge manually

errors.name: InvalidVoteConfig
errors.msg: Invalid vote config: n_pools out of range or bps do not sum to 10 000

errors.name: FounderVestingLocked
errors.msg: Founder hiSOLA is vesting-locked — amount exceeds unlocked allocation

types.name: BribeVault
docs: Bribe pot for one (pool_id, reward_mint, epoch) triplet.
Permissionless — any protocol can deposit. Multiple deposits per epoch are additive.
PDA: [b"bribe_vault", pool_id, reward_mint, epoch_le8]

types.name: ContributorVesting
docs: Per-contributor dual vesting schedule (marketing, community, service providers).
Mirrors the founder allocation — two tranches per contributor:
• hiSOLA: governance rights + borrow collateral (mints SOLA to sola_vault 1:1)
• oSOLA:  liquid options (exercisable at floor price via exercise_o_sola)
Borrow cap: 10 % of the monthly hiSOLA installment (hi_sola_amount / 12 × 10%).
Flash-borrow guard: same slot-based defence as regular `borrow_usdc`.
Repay:      uses the standard `repay_usdc` instruction (same UserPosition PDA).
PDA: [b"contributor", contributor_wallet]

types.name: FounderHiSolaVesting
docs: Progressive hiSOLA distribution for the founder (7 M stake tranche).
Minting is deferred — no SOLA enters total_sola until claim_founder_hi_sola.
Each claim mints claimable SOLA to sola_vault + hiSOLA to founder 1:1.
PDA: [b"founder_hi_vesting"]

types.name: FounderVesting
docs: Progressive oSOLA vesting for the founder (5 M liquid tranche).
Founder claims oSOLA linearly; exercises via exercise_o_sola to get SOLA
at floor price — each exercise ADDS 1 USDC to floor_vault (net positive).
Vesting formula (after cliff):
total_vested = total_amount × min(elapsed, VESTING_DURATION_SECS) / VESTING_DURATION_SECS
claimable    = total_vested − already_claimed
PDA: [b"founder_vesting"]

fields.name: total_amount
docs: Total oSOLA under vesting (= FOUNDER_LIQUID = 5 000 000).

fields.name: claimed
docs: Cumulative oSOLA already minted to the founder.

fields.name: start_ts
docs: Unix timestamp when `mint_founder_allocation` was executed.

types.name: GaugeState
docs: Aggregate hiSOLA vote-weight directed at a pool for one epoch.
PDA: [b"gauge", pool_id, epoch_le8]

types.name: GlobalEpochVotes
docs: Total hiSOLA vote-weight cast across ALL pools in one epoch.
Used as denominator when splitting LP_EMISSION_PER_EPOCH across pools.
PDA: [b"epoch_votes", epoch_le8]

types.name: LpEpochClaim
docs: Proof-of-claim for LP emissions — created by claim_lp_emissions, blocks replay.
PDA: [b"lp_claim", user, pool, epoch_le8]

types.name: LpPoolEpochAccum
docs: Time-weighted total LP supply for one pool in one epoch.
Finalized by emit_pool_rewards after epoch ends; records oSOLA allocation.
PDA: [b"lp_pool_epoch", pool, epoch_le8]

types.name: LpUserCheckpoint
docs: Continuous time-weighted LP balance for one (user, pool) pair.
Accumulates: weighted_balance += lp_balance × elapsed_secs each checkpoint.
Reset to 0 at the start of each new epoch.
PDA: [b"lp_ckpt", pool, user]

types.name: LpUserInfo
docs: Per-user oSOLA reward state for one (user, pool) pair.
Created on first add_liquidity, claim_lp_rewards, or remove_liquidity.
PDA: [b"lp_user", pool, user]

types.name: PartnerAllocation
docs: One-time locked hiSOLA allocation for a protocol partner (Jito, Marinade, Solayer…).
Unlike the contributor system (cliff + linear vesting), the partner receives their
full allocation in a single `claim_partner_allocation` call — but hiSOLA is minted
DIRECTLY into their ve_lock_vault, bypassing the wallet entirely.
Consequences:
- Voting power is immediate via VeLockPosition (up to 4× ve multiplier).
- Borrow is naturally blocked: wallet hiSOLA balance = 0 during the lock
(`borrow_usdc` guard: `new_borrowed <= hi_sola_balance` always fails).
- `total_hi_sola` is NOT incremented — locked hiSOLA is excluded from the
fee accumulator denominator (same semantics as `lock_hi_sola`).
- After lock expiry: `unlock_hi_sola` → hiSOLA back to wallet → standard rules.
PDA: [b"partner", partner_wallet]

types.name: PolState
docs: Singleton PDA controlling protocol-owned liquidity.
PDA: [b"pol"]

fields.name: pol_split_bps
docs: Suggested % of market_vault fees to divert (informational, enforced off-chain).

fields.name: target_pool
docs: AmmPool PDA that receives POL liquidity deposits.

fields.name: usdc_accumulated
docs: Lifetime USDC routed through collect_to_pol.

fields.name: founder_allocated
docs: Prevents mint_founder_allocation from being called more than once.

fields.name: ecosystem_allocated
docs: Prevents mint_ecosystem_allocation from being called more than once.

fields.name: total_usdc_borrowed
docs: Sum of all outstanding USDC borrows across all users.
Invariant: floor_vault + total_usdc_borrowed >= total_sola at all times.

fields.name: total_purchased_sola
docs: SOLA minted exclusively via buy_sola or exercise_o_sola (floor-backed supply).
Used as the invariant denominator in sell_sola, replacing total_sola which
includes unfinanced founder/ecosystem allocations.

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag — set by authority via `pause` instruction.
When true, all state-mutating entry instructions revert with ProtocolPaused.
Exit paths (sell_sola, unstake, repay, remove_liquidity, claim_*, unlock)
are intentionally excluded so users can always withdraw their funds.

fields.name: osola_emission_initial
docs: Starting emission for the epoch-based gauge system (oSOLA per epoch).
Set at `initialize`; overridable via `configure_emissions`.

fields.name: osola_emission_decay_bps
docs: Decay factor applied each epoch (basis points, 10 000 = no decay).
Default: 9 900 (−1 %/epoch ≈ −40 %/year).

fields.name: osola_emission_floor_bps
docs: Minimum emission as % of initial (basis points).
Default: 1 000 (10 % floor — emissions never reach zero).

fields.name: osola_emission_start_epoch
docs: Epoch at which the decay clock started (reset by `configure_emissions`).

types.name: UserBribeClaim
docs: Created during claim_bribe — its existence proves the claim was made.
PDA: [b"bribe_claim", user, pool_id, reward_mint, epoch_le8]

types.name: UserEpochVotes
docs: Tracks total vote-weight already allocated by one user in an epoch (across all pools).
Prevents voting more than the user's hiSOLA balance.
`total_power_snapshot` is captured on the **first** vote of the epoch (hiSOLA + ve-power
at that exact moment). All subsequent votes in the same epoch are checked against this
snapshot — preventing a user from over-spending if their lock expires or they transfer
hiSOLA between two separate `vote_gauge` calls.
PDA: [b"uev", user, epoch_le8]

fields.name: o_sola_bonus
docs: Extra voting power earned by burning oSOLA this epoch.
Resets every epoch (new PDA). Not subject to the 30% hiSOLA cap —
burning oSOLA is a deflationary act that justifies uncapped influence.

fields.name: last_borrow_slot
docs: Slot at which the most recent borrow was executed.
repay_usdc requires current_slot > last_borrow_slot — blocks same-tx
flash-borrow attacks where USDC is borrowed and repaid atomically.

types.name: UserVoteConfig
docs: Persistent gauge vote allocation for a hiSOLA holder.
Once set with `auto_replay = true`, any caller (keeper, partner, cron bot)
can invoke `replay_vote` each epoch to carry forward these preferences
without requiring the owner to sign — enabling fully passive participation,
identical to Beradrome / Velodrome auto-rolling vote behaviour.
The vote weight is recalculated from the owner's **current** hiSOLA balance
+ ve-power each epoch, so the allocation scales correctly as positions change.
The 30% per-address anti-whale cap applies on every replay, same as `vote_gauge`.
PDA: [b"vote_config", user]

fields.name: pools
docs: Pools to vote for — unused slots hold Pubkey::default().

fields.name: bps
docs: Basis points per pool (active entries must sum to exactly 10 000).

fields.name: n_pools
docs: Number of active entries (1–5).

fields.name: auto_replay
docs: When true, `replay_vote` is allowed by any caller.
When false, the owner must call `vote_gauge` manually each epoch.

types.name: UserVoteReceipt
docs: Records one user's vote for a specific (pool, epoch) pair.
Created with `init` — immutable once written, prevents double-voting for same pool.
PDA: [b"vote", user, pool_id, epoch_le8]

types.name: VeLockPosition
docs: Per-user lock state for ve-weighted governance.
Locking hiSOLA transfers tokens to ve_lock_vault and removes them from the
fee accumulator denominator. Locked hiSOLA earns ve voting power instead.
PDA: [b"velock", user]
